content: Analyze current KYC admin panel structure and data flow
Create backend DELETE endpoint for KYC applications
Create backend PATCH endpoint for editing KYC data
Add audit logging service for KYC changes
Add Edit and Delete buttons to KYC detail panel UI
Make KYC fields editable in edit mode (personal info + documents)
Add confirmation modals for delete and edit actions
Test with NEW test users only (never real clients)
Verify all KYC workflows still work correctly
